user.title: Create a Lightener device
user.description: Please provide a name for the Lightener device you are creating

data_description.name: The purpose is to clearly indicate which group of lights is controlled by this device. Typically, it is an area or room name, such as "Living Room," but it can be anything

lights.title: Controlled lights
lights.description: Choose your lights and a starter curve preset. Existing/new curves can be fine-tuned visually in the **Lightener Editor** sidebar panel (`/lightener-editor`) or the **Lightener Curve Editor** dashboard card after setup.

data.controlled_entities: Select the light entities to be controlled by this Lightener device
data.curve_preset: Starter curve preset for newly added lights

data_description.curve_preset: Applied only when adding new lights. Existing light curves are kept as-is.

init.title: Controlled lights
init.description: Add or remove lights below and choose a starter preset for new lights. Existing brightness curves are preserved. For visual editing, use the **Lightener Editor** sidebar panel (`/lightener-editor`) or the **Lightener Curve Editor** card on your dashboard.

data.controlled_entities: Select the light entities to be controlled by this Lightener device
data.curve_preset: Starter curve preset for newly added lights

data_description.curve_preset: Applied only to lights added in this step.
